items.claim: Alden Corer has high-level boxing skills.
items.quote: He has got really good boxing and he's overall just a very dangerous prospect for 125.

items.claim: Stuart Nickel has a poor record in the UFC with three losses and no wins.
items.quote: Three losses, one dominant decision and two finishes as well. Just hasn't been a good UFC run for Steuart Nickel

items.claim: Felipe Franco has a 100% finishing rate in his professional victories.
items.quote: Every single one of his wins he has finished so far. So, he has a 100% finishing rate in victories.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez Jr. failed a drug test for steroids after his Contender Series appearance.
items.quote: he won a day's contender series, I think, last year or the year before and he ended up popping for steroids

items.claim: Alvin Hines has an 86% finishing rate.
items.quote: 86% finishing rep for the heavyweight division

items.claim: Sukyong K is an elite wrestler.
Dion Barbosa is primarily a submission grappler.
items.quote: Primarily a submission grappler. She wants to take the fight down to get a submission

items.claim: Jose Delgado has a 91% finishing rate.
items.quote: he's got a 91% finishing rate as well.

items.claim: Austin Bashier's primary fighting style is pressure grappling.
items.quote: he's essentially a pressure grappler. He wants to continuously take you down round after round

items.claim: Fatima Mlim has a superior grappling background compared to Tabitha Richie.
items.quote: Grappler versus Grappler. I'm going to go with Fatima Mlan. She's got the bigger grappling background.
